properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord You've chosen me to overcome, in this day You knew the tests that I will face in this evil age I'll leave those things behind, and I’ll run for the prize And press towards the mark of the high calling in Christ

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In the inner veil, Your promises I see Through Your sacrifice on the cross Where You died to set me free I'm giving You my all, that Your will be done in me Lord let me live my life, in the inner veil Full submission Lord, in the inner veil

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I’m dying every day, to things I see in me In Your Word You promised, I'll have the victory For me to live is Christ, and for me to die is gain Your promise I will take, no matter what the pain

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord I'm laying my all on the altar of sacrifice To be changed into Your image that I could reflect Your life On the threshing floor like Ruth in full obedience I will come Cover me with Your skirt that we two can become one

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: In the inner veil, Your promises I see Through Your sacrifice on the cross Where You died to set me free I'm giving You my all, that Your will be done in me Lord let me live my life (haa… haa… aa… haa… aa…)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: In the inner veil, Your promises, I see (Your promises I see…) Through Your sacrifice on the cross (Thank you Lord…) Where You died to set me free Now I'm giving You my all, that Your will be done in me Lord let me live my life,

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: In the inner veil (Your Holiest of Holies) Your promises I see (Your promises I see…) Through Your sacrifice on the cross (Thank you Lord…) Where You died to set me free Now I'm giving You my all, that Your will be done in me Lord let me live my life, in the inner veil… Full submission Lord, in the inner veil Total obedience Lord, in the inner veil Full surrender Lord…. (hoo…) in the inner veil…
